creator: rflynn@acsalaska.net
text:
New shar attached.
Had to add a patch to make adding a new host via webinterface work
correctly. Issue has been fixed upstream, but as of yet no new release.

Also modified pkg-message to warn against using the php functions for
data retrieval ($config['snmp']['internal']). Fixing this would require
several patches in several files and the default setting is to use the
net-snmp binaries, so things will work correctly out of the box.
-- 
Mel
